summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase U Professional Fashion Expert features. All core functionality working correctly with one minor bug fixed.

minor_bugs_fixed.issue: Missing is_professional field in public directory response

passed_tests: Professional Profile Setup - PATCH /users/me accepts professional fields
Professional Directory Listing - GET /professionals returns only professionals
Professional Directory Filters - country, region, profession, q filters work
Professional Individual Lookup - GET /professionals/{id} returns individual
Ad Campaign Creation - POST /ads/campaigns works for professionals only
Ad Campaign CRUD - Full CRUD operations working
Ad Ticker System - GET /ads/ticker with regional filtering
Impression Click Tracking - POST /ads/impression and /ads/click work
Admin Controls - Admin endpoints for professionals and ads
Ticker Skips Disabled - Disabled campaigns excluded from ticker
Ticker Date Window - Future campaigns excluded from ticker
Impression Increments Spent - 1 cent per impression tracked
Click Increments Spent - 5 cents per click tracked
Campaign Owner Only - Non-owners get 403 for campaign access
